mapper.select: /* adm-file-sql-oracle.xml - selectFileInfoList */ SELECT FILEKEY , FILESEQ , APKEY , MEKEY , APKEY || '/' || FILEPATH AS FILE_PATH , FILESIZE , FILEEXTS , ORIGFILENM , SAVEFILENM FROM TADMIN_MST_FILE WHERE FILEKEY = #{filekey}

/* adm-file-sql-oracle.xml - selectFileInfo */ SELECT FILEKEY , FILESEQ , APKEY , MEKEY , APKEY || '/' || FILEPATH AS FILE_PATH , FILESIZE , FILEEXTS , ORIGFILENM , SAVEFILENM FROM TADMIN_MST_FILE WHERE FILEKEY = #{filekey} AND FILESEQ = #{fileseq}
SELECT FILEPATH , FILEEXTS , ORIGFILENM , SAVEFILENM FROM TADMIN_EXCELTEMPL WHERE USKEY = #{uskey} AND GRIDDIVCD = #{griddivcd}
